Bash(python3 -c "
import json
path = 'C:/Users/marti/Documents/OceanDashboard/ocean-dashboard/public/data/temperature/sst_2024_year.json'
with open\(path\) as f:
    d = json.load\(f\)
pts = d['points']
lons = [p['lon'] for p in pts]
print\('lon min:', min\(lons\), 'lon max:', max\(lons\)\)
print\('total points:', len\(pts\)\)
neg = [p for p in pts if p['lon'] < 0]
print\('points with lon < 0:', len\(neg\)\)
pos = [p for p in pts if p['lon'] >= 0]
print\('points with lon >= 0:', len\(pos\)\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
path = 'C:/Users/marti/Documents/OceanDashboard/ocean-dashboard/public/data/temperature/sst_2024_year.json'
with open\(path\) as f:
    d = json.load\(f\)
pts = d['points']
lons = [p['lon'] for p in pts]
lats = [p['lat'] for p in pts]
print\('lon range:', min\(lons\), 'to', max\(lons\)\)
print\('lat range:', min\(lats\), 'to', max\(lats\)\)
print\('total points:', len\(pts\)\)
print\('negative lons:', len\([l for l in lons if l < 0]\)\)
print\('zero lon:', len\([l for l in lons if l == 0]\)\)
print\('first 5 lons:', sorted\(set\(lons\)\)[:5]\)
print\('last 5 lons:', sorted\(set\(lons\)\)[-5:]\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import xarray as xr
ds = xr.open_dataset\('C:/Users/marti/Documents/OceanDashboard/ocean-dashboard/data/raw/temperature/sst.mnmean.nc'\)
sst = ds['sst']
lons = sst.lon.values
lats = sst.lat.values
print\('lon values \(first 10\):', lons[:10]\)
print\('lon values \(last 10\):', lons[-10:]\)
print\('lon range:', lons.min\(\), 'to', lons.max\(\)\)
print\('lat range:', lats.min\(\), 'to', lats.max\(\)\)
print\('shape:', sst.shape\)
ds.close\(\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import json, sys
path = 'C:/Users/marti/Documents/OceanDashboard/ocean-dashboard/public/data/temperature/'
for yr in [1970, 1974, 1975, 2000]:
    with open\(path + f'sst_{yr}_year.json'\) as f:
        d = json.load\(f\)
    pts = d['points']
    lons = [p['lon'] for p in pts]
    neg = sum\(1 for l in lons if l < 0\)
    pos = sum\(1 for l in lons if l >= 0\)
    print\(f'{yr}: total={len\(pts\)}  west\(lon<0\)={neg}  east\(lon>=0\)={pos}  lon_range=[{min\(lons\):.1f}, {max\(lons\):.1f}]'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import netCDF4 as nc
import numpy as np
ds = nc.Dataset\('C:/Users/marti/Documents/OceanDashboard/ocean-dashboard/data/raw/temperature/sst.mnmean.nc'\)
times = ds.variables['time']
dates = nc.num2date\(times[:], times.units\)
years = sorted\(set\(d.year for d in dates\)\)
print\('Années disponibles \(dernières\):', years[-5:]\)
print\('Dernière date:', dates[-1]\)
ds.close\(\)
")
